name: open_app
description: Open an app window (files, edge, notes, settings).

args.app: one of: files, edge, notes, settings
one of: files, edge, notes, settings

name: set_brightness
description: Set screen brightness on real hardware.

name: toggle_setting
description: Toggle a quick setting (wi-fi, bluetooth, airplane, focus, night light).

name: minimize_all
description: Minimize every window and show the desktop.

name: summarize_notifications
description: Summarize and open the notifications panel.

name: browse
description: Open the browser, optionally to a URL or query.

args.q: a URL or search text, optional

name: search_files
description: Open Files and search the home folder.

name: show_panel
description: Open a shell panel (noti, qs, widgets).

name: system_status
description: Report battery, network, and uptime from real hardware.
